title: Goal 002 anti-slop baseline
description: Create the first Goal 002 engineering guardrail slice: inspect current Python/TS complexity, frozen-file growth risk and existing quality commands before adding new content workflow behavior.
design: Start with reporting and changed-code guardrails. Do not refactor the whole repo in this issue. Frozen files are main.py, wilq/schemas.py, wilq/actions/service.py, wilq/briefing/content_diagnostics.py, tests/test_api_contracts.py and ContentDiagnosticSurface.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: A focused audit command or documented baseline reports largest Python files/functions/classes, TS Fallow summary and frozen-file risk. PLANS/PROGRESS record the proof. No new product behavior is added in this slice.
close_reason: Anti-slop baseline implemented: scripts/audit_complexity.py reports Python hotspots and frozen-file growth risk; proof recorded in docs/handoffs/2026-06-30-goal-002-anti-slop-baseline.md; focused checks passed and historical Ruff/mypy/Fallow failures are documented as baseline debt.

title: Goal 002: Content Production Engine bez slopu
description: Build the next WILQ product layer for Ekologus content production without SEO slop or technical slop. The goal is an API-first workflow from evidence through content inventory, preflight, preserve-first planning, sales brief, claim ledger, draft package, human review, WordPress draft handoff and measurement window.
design: PLANS.md remains the product execution plan. Beads tracks operational slices only. Do not add prompt-only drafting, React label remappers, deprecated aliases, dev URL canonical semantics or new feature growth inside frozen monolith files.
acceptance_criteria: At least one real Ekologus content item can move through ContentWorkItem -> evidence IDs -> source connectors -> inventory/canonical resolution -> duplicate/cannibalization check -> preflight verdict -> preserve-first plan -> sales brief -> claim ledger -> draft package -> human review -> WordPress draft handoff -> measurement window, with focused tests and no skipped gates.

title: Record real marketer UAT or explicit owner defer
description: Run the current UAT handoff with Wilku/marketer or record an explicit owner defer. This is the only acceptable blocker for claiming usefulness beyond technical readiness.
design: Use docs/handoffs/2026-06-29-marketer-uat-ready.md as the current handoff. Do not substitute simulated walkthroughs for real UAT.
acceptance_criteria: docs/handoffs contains the UAT result or explicit owner defer. docs/PROGRESS.md and docs/goals/001-goal.md state the outcome without claiming real UAT if it did not happen. goal_001_completion_check reflects the same state.
close_reason: Owner defer recorded in docs/handoffs/2026-06-30-owner-defer-marketer-uat.json and validated with scripts/goal_001_completion_check.py --owner-defer

title: Goal 001: clean marketer cockpit and product semantics
description: Track the remaining work for Goal 001: clean WILQ active product semantics, marketer-facing Polish surfaces, condensation, URL semantics and proof before moving to later MOS layers.
design: PLAN.md remains the canonical cleanup plan. Beads tracks operational work and dependencies; it does not replace product docs or WILQ knowledge cards.
acceptance_criteria: Goal 001 completion check passes or remaining work is explicitly represented as open beads with owner/UAT blocker noted. PLAN.md, docs/goals/001-goal.md and docs/PROGRESS.md stay short and aligned.

title: Goal 002 Content Measurement Window v1
description: Add a post-publication measurement window model for content work items so WILQ cannot claim success or failure before evidence exists.
design: Measurement window records baseline period, observation period, earliest verdict date, allowed metrics, source connectors and current status. No success/failure language before the window is ready for review.
acceptance_criteria: Tests prove content outcome claims are blocked before the measurement window closes and that every WordPress draft handoff schedules or requires a measurement window.
close_reason: Completed Content Measurement Window v1 baseline: added measurement window contract with baseline period, observation period, earliest verdict date, allowed metrics, source connectors, evidence IDs and optional WordPress handoff link. Outcome claims stay blocked before the window reaches ready_for_review/closed after earliest_verdict_date; handoff requires or schedules a measurement window. Checks passed: tests/content/test_measurement_window.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new measurement module, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and staged git diff --check.

title: Goal 002 WordPress Draft Handoff v1
description: Implement a gated WordPress draft handoff for approved content packages only, with audit and no publication.
design: The handoff creates or prepares a WordPress draft only after approved human review. No automatic publish, no destructive update of existing canonical content and no dev URL canonical target.
acceptance_criteria: Tests prove no WordPress draft handoff without human review, audit envelope, final canonical URL and safe draft status. Publish/apply remains blocked.
close_reason: Completed WordPress Draft Handoff v1 baseline: added prepare-only draft handoff contract requiring public final canonical URL, matching Draft Package, approved Human Review and audit envelope with evidence IDs. Handoff blocks dev preview canonical targets, non-approved review, missing audit, mismatched draft packages and publish-ready draft packages; it emits post_status=draft, publish_allowed=false and destructive_update_allowed=false, and only marks workflow draft_created when a real WordPress post ID is provided. Checks passed: tests/content/test_wordpress_handoff.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on new handoff/workflow modules, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.

title: Goal 002 Human Review v1
description: Add explicit human review records for content brief, claim ledger, draft package and WordPress draft handoff decisions.
design: Robot cannot mark content publish-ready. Review events must record reviewer, decision, notes, checked items, evidence IDs and blocked claims handled.
acceptance_criteria: Tests prove WordPress draft handoff is blocked without approved human review, and review results are available to the content workflow state.
close_reason: Completed Human Review v1 baseline: added typed content human review records for sales brief, claim ledger, draft package and WordPress handoff stages. Review requires reviewer, decision, checked items, evidence IDs and handled blocked claims; only approved review can update ContentWorkItem to human_review_status=approved and unblock the WordPress handoff gate. Checks passed: tests/content/test_human_review.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on new review/workflow modules, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.

title: Goal 002 Draft Package v1
description: Create a typed draft package workflow that can produce outline-first content only after preflight, sales brief and claim ledger gates pass.
design: Draft packages are not publish-ready. They must include brief_id, claim_ledger_id, section_to_evidence_map, claims_used, claims_removed_or_blocked, human_review_questions and publish_ready=false.
acceptance_criteria: Tests prove drafts are blocked without preflight, sales brief and claim ledger, and generated draft packages always include evidence mapping and human review questions.
close_reason: Completed Draft Package v1 baseline: outline-first draft packages now build only after draft_allowed preflight, matching Sales Brief, matching Claim Ledger and source-fact evidence mapping. Packages include brief_id, claim_ledger_id, section-to-evidence map, publish-ready claims, blocked claims removed, human review questions and publish_ready=false. Checks passed: tests/content/test_draft_package.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.

title: Goal 002 Claim Ledger v1
description: Add a structured claim ledger for content promises, SEO/performance claims, compliance/environmental-adjacent claims and business outcome claims.
design: Claims are data, not prompt instructions. Statuses include allowed_with_evidence, allowed_general, needs_human_review, blocked and blocked_until_measurement. Unsupported promises of rankings, leads, revenue, full legal compliance or guaranteed outcomes are blocked.
acceptance_criteria: Tests prove blocked claims cannot appear as publish-ready language and draft generation remains blocked when required claim review is missing.
notes: Slice proof 2026-06-30: added Claim Ledger v1 in wilq/content/claims/ledger.py. Claims are structured entries with type, status, evidence IDs, reason and optional reviewer. Deterministic rules block guarantee claims, block SEO/performance/business outcome claims until measurement is ready, require human review for legal/risk/environmental claims and block allowed_with_evidence entries that have no evidence. Focused tests prove blocked claims are excluded from publish-ready claims and draft remains blocked when required claim review or evidence is missing. Checks passed: tests/content/test_claim_ledger.py, tests/content (67 tests), Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke for wilq/content, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.
close_reason: Completed Claim Ledger v1 baseline: claims are structured data with allowed, review-required, blocked and blocked-until-measurement statuses; blocked or unreviewed risky claims cannot be publish-ready and draft remains blocked when claim review/evidence is missing.

title: Goal 002 Sales Brief v1
description: Create an API-owned sales/content brief contract for Ekologus content work items before any draft is generated.
design: The brief is not a prompt. It must include buyer problem, buyer trigger, target reader, search intent, service fit, source facts, evidence IDs, final canonical target, existing content plan, H1/H2/FAQ/CTA direction, internal links, forbidden claims, missing evidence and measurement plan.
acceptance_criteria: A sales brief endpoint/service can build a structured brief only from a valid work item/preflight. Tests prove no brief is produced without required evidence and final URL semantics.
notes: Slice proof 2026-06-30: added Sales Brief v1 in wilq/content/briefs/sales.py. The brief is a typed contract built only from ContentWorkItem, ContentPreflight v2, Content Inventory v1, Claim Ledger v1 and an explicit seed with buyer problem, buyer trigger, target reader, search intent, service fit, source facts, H1/H2/FAQ/CTA direction, internal links, missing evidence and measurement plan. Focused tests prove no brief is produced without required evidence/source facts, valid final canonical semantics, preflight allowance or measurement plan, and that dev preview URLs are rejected as final canonical. Checks passed: tests/content/test_sales_brief.py, tests/content (74 tests), Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke for wilq/content, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.
close_reason: Completed Sales Brief v1 baseline: typed brief contract now builds only from valid work item/preflight/inventory/claim ledger inputs, with required evidence, final canonical URL, source facts, forbidden claims and measurement plan. No draft generation or React-side decision logic was added.

title: Goal 002 ContentPreflight v2
description: Turn the current 'Czy można pisać?' surface into a first-class API workflow verdict with blocked, plan_allowed, brief_allowed, draft_allowed and handoff_allowed states.
design: Preflight cannot draft or write. Draft is allowed only after sales brief and claim ledger. Handoff is allowed only after human review. React must render API-owned labels and disabled reasons.
acceptance_criteria: Focused tests cover no evidence, missing connector, missing final canonical, dev URL as canonical, existing content preserve-first, duplicate risk, missing brief and missing human review.
notes: Slice proof 2026-06-30: added ContentPreflight v2 workflow verdict in wilq/content/preflight/workflow.py. The verdict exposes blocked, plan_allowed, brief_allowed, draft_allowed and handoff_allowed states over ContentWorkItem plus Content Inventory v1. Preflight still does not draft or write: it only exposes create_allowed, sales_brief_allowed, draft_allowed and wordpress_draft_allowed booleans with blockers. Focused tests cover no evidence, missing connector, missing final canonical, dev preview as canonical, existing content preserve-first, duplicate risk, missing brief, missing human review and full handoff allowed. Checks passed: tests/content/test_preflight_workflow.py, tests/content (61 tests), Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke for wilq/content, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.
close_reason: Completed ContentPreflight v2 domain verdict: blocked, plan_allowed, brief_allowed, draft_allowed and handoff_allowed states now compose ContentWorkItem and Content Inventory v1 without drafting, writing or React-side decision logic.

title: Goal 002 Content Inventory v1
description: Build a first content inventory layer that can answer what content exists on Ekologus public sources, what final canonical URL is known, and whether a topic should preserve, refresh, merge, create after review or block.
design: Inventory is a domain service, not React logic and not skill logic. Dev preview URLs are not historical SEO evidence and must not become final canonical URLs.
acceptance_criteria: Content inventory returns structured records with URL/canonical/status/source/evidence fields and focused tests cover existing URL, missing final canonical, dev preview as non-canonical and duplicate-risk inputs.
notes: Slice proof 2026-06-30: added Content Inventory v1 records/resolution in wilq/content/inventory/records.py. Inventory now returns structured records and a resolution with URL, final canonical, preview, source connectors, evidence IDs, blockers and preserve/create/block mode. Focused tests cover existing public URL preserve-first, missing final canonical blocker, dev preview URL as invalid canonical, unresolved duplicate risk blocking create, clear duplicate check allowing create_after_review and canonical deduplication. Checks passed: tests/content/test_inventory_records.py, tests/content (52 tests), Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke for wilq/content, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.
close_reason: Completed Content Inventory v1 baseline: structured inventory records and resolution now support preserve-first decisions, missing canonical blockers, dev-preview canonical rejection, duplicate-risk blockers and create_after_review only after a clear duplicate check.

title: Goal 002 extract API routers without behavior change
description: Split FastAPI router responsibilities out of apps/api/wilq_api/main.py while preserving endpoint paths and JSON response shapes.
design: This is behavior-preserving extraction only. main.py should move toward a thin app/entrypoint; no new content product behavior should be added in the extraction slice.
acceptance_criteria: Focused API contract tests and live smoke prove existing endpoints still respond with the same shape. main.py loses routing responsibility without changing marketer behavior.
notes:
Slice proof 2026-06-30: read-only connector endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/connectors.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Connector refresh POST remains in main.py until cache invalidation is extracted safely. Focused checks passed: tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_connector_registry_contains_required_connectors, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_localo_status_requires_api_token_and_organization_id, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_connector_status_does_not_expose_secret_values, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_connector_refresh_run_persists_redacted_evidence, tests/test_metric_store_and_cli.py::test_metrics_api_exposes_metric_store_status_and_facts, tests/test_connector_status_labels.py, route-shape smoke for /api/connectors and connector status/refresh-run reads, Ruff on touched API files, mypy on the new router, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. This is partial progress; keep issue open for more router extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: jobs and job-run endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/jobs.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Scheduler domain behavior stays in wilq.jobs; main.py still uses scheduler_status for system-status aggregation only. Focused checks passed: tests/test_jobs_scheduler.py, route-shape smoke for /api/jobs, /api/jobs/status, /api/jobs/{job_id}, /api/job-runs and 404 paths, Ruff on touched API files, mypy on routers/connectors.py and routers/jobs.py, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. This is partial progress; keep issue open for more router extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: evidence and metric read endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/evidence.py and apps/api/wilq_api/routers/metrics.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Context-pack internals still read evidence/metric stores directly where they build compact operator context. Focused checks passed: tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_evidence_registry_exposes_connector_status_without_secret_values, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_actions_reference_registered_evidence_ids, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_connector_refresh_run_persists_redacted_evidence, tests/test_metric_store_and_cli.py::test_metrics_api_exposes_metric_store_status_and_facts, tests/test_metric_store_and_cli.py::test_metric_fact_evidence_ids_are_resolvable_without_refresh_run_state, route-shape smoke for /api/evidence and /api/metrics reads, Ruff on touched API files, mypy on evidence.py and metrics.py routers, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. This is partial progress; keep issue open for more router extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: knowledge and expert-rule endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/knowledge.py and apps/api/wilq_api/routers/expert.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Context-pack compaction helpers remain in main.py for a later scoped extraction. Focused checks passed: tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_expert_rules_are_loaded_from_structured_files, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_expert_capabilities_are_available_through_api, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_knowledge_playbooks_are_machine_readable_and_evidence_gated, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_knowledge_compiler_produces_lineage_preserving_card_types, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_knowledge_operating_map_binds_sources_to_decisions, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_codex_context_pack_includes_expert_rule_summaries, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_codex_context_pack_includes_compiled_knowledge_cards, route-shape smoke for /api/knowledge and /api/expert reads, Ruff on touched API files, mypy on knowledge.py and expert.py routers, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. This is partial progress; keep issue open for more router extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: workflow and workflow-run endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/workflows.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Codex run endpoints remain in main.py for a later context-runtime router slice. Focused checks passed: tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_workflows_are_decision_backed_operator_contracts, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_workflow_run_persists_to_local_state_with_redaction, route-shape smoke for /api/workflows and /api/workflow-runs reads/writes/404 paths, Ruff on touched API files, mypy on workflows.py, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check via rtk proxy after fixing a trailing blank line. This is partial progress; keep issue open for more router extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: root, health and system-status endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/system.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Context-pack construction still reads connector/opportunity state in main.py until context runtime extraction. Focused checks passed: tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_health_endpoint, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_system_status_reports_credential_runtime_without_paths_or_filenames, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_system_status_reports_local_state_without_path, route-shape smoke for /, /api/health and /api/system/status, Ruff on touched API files, mypy on system.py, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. This is partial progress; keep issue open for more router extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: opportunity list/detail/recompute endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/opportunities.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Context-pack construction still calls list_opportunities() directly until context runtime extraction. Focused checks passed: tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_opportunities_are_derived_from_evidence_and_rule_mappings, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_opportunity_requires_source_connector, tests/test_api_contracts.py::test_opportunity_requires_evidence_id, route-shape smoke for /api/opportunities reads/recompute/404 path, Ruff on touched API files, mypy on opportunities.py, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. This is partial progress; keep issue open for more router extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: read-only command center, marketing and domain diagnostics endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/diagnostics.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Moved paths: /api/dashboard/command-center, /api/marketing/brief, /api/marketing/tactical-queue, /api/ads/diagnostics, /api/merchant/diagnostics, /api/content/diagnostics, /api/content/preflight, /api/ga4/diagnostics, /api/localo/diagnostics and /api/ahrefs/diagnostics. Demand Gen diagnostics remains in main.py until its context-heavy readiness builder is extracted safely. Focused checks passed: ruff for main.py/diagnostics.py, mypy diagnostics router, TestClient route smoke for moved endpoints, focused API contract pytest for moved surfaces, dashboard App.test suite, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. This is partial progress; keep issue open for more router extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: action, audit and mutation-audit endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/actions.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Moved paths: /api/actions, /api/actions/{action_id}, /api/actions/{action_id}/validate, /review, /preview, /confirm, /impact-check, /apply, /api/audit/events, /api/action-mutation-audits and /api/actions/{action_id}/mutation-audits. The router receives clear_api_view_model_caches as an injected callback, preserving cache clearing after mutating action calls without a router-to-main import. Focused checks passed: ruff for main.py/actions.py, mypy actions router, TestClient route smoke for action/audit paths including expected 409 apply blocker and 404 unknown action, focused API contract pytest for action validation/review/preview/confirm/impact/apply/audit side effects, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. main.py now only keeps connector refresh, Demand Gen diagnostics and Codex/context endpoints. This is partial progress; keep issue open for remaining router/context extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: connector refresh POST moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/connectors.py without changing endpoint path or response shape. Moved path: POST /api/connectors/{connector}/refresh. The connectors router now receives clear_api_view_model_caches as an injected callback, preserving cache clearing after refresh without a router-to-main import. Focused checks passed: ruff for main.py/connectors.py, mypy connectors router, TestClient route smoke for connector reads, unknown refresh 404 and controlled google_sheets blocked vendor_read refresh, focused connector API pytest including google_sheets disabled-scope refresh, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. main.py now only keeps Demand Gen diagnostics and Codex/context endpoints. This is partial progress; keep issue open for remaining Demand Gen/context extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: Demand Gen diagnostics endpoint moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/demand_gen.py without changing endpoint path or response shape. Moved path: GET /api/demand-gen/diagnostics. The router receives the existing _build_demand_gen_readiness_contract callable as an injected builder, so the context-heavy readiness builder remains in main.py for later scoped context extraction. Focused checks passed: ruff for main.py/demand_gen.py, mypy demand_gen router, TestClient route smoke for /api/demand-gen/diagnostics, focused Demand Gen API/context pytest, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. main.py now only keeps Codex/context endpoints. This is partial progress; keep issue open for context extraction.
Slice proof 2026-06-30: Codex context and Codex run endpoints moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into apps/api/wilq_api/routers/codex.py without changing endpoint paths or response shapes. Moved paths: GET /api/codex/context, POST /api/codex/context-pack, POST /api/codex/runs and GET /api/codex/runs. ContextPackRequest moved to apps/api/wilq_api/context_models.py so the router does not import main.py. The router receives the existing context_pack callable as an injected builder; heavy context-pack construction remains in main.py for later runtime extraction. Focused checks passed: ruff for main.py/context_models.py/codex.py, mypy context_models.py/codex.py, TestClient route smoke for Codex context/context-pack/runs, focused Codex/context API pytest, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. main.py now has no direct @app.get/@app.post route handlers. This completes behavior-preserving API route extraction; keep issue open only if the next slice extracts context runtime internals.
close_reason: Completed behavior-preserving API route extraction: main.py no longer declares direct @app.get/@app.post route handlers; all endpoint paths are preserved through routers; focused Codex/context route smoke, API tests, Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity and git diff --check passed. Remaining heavy context-pack runtime extraction is tracked separately as wilq-seo-462.

title: Goal 002 ContentWorkItem workflow state
description: Add a typed ContentWorkItem workflow model that tracks one content item from evidence through inventory, preflight, planning, brief, claims, draft, human review, WordPress handoff and measurement.
design: No deprecated target_site fields. The model must use source_public_url, final_canonical_url, intended_final_url and preview_url only where those concepts are real.
acceptance_criteria: Tests prove the state machine blocks skipping preflight, sales brief, claim ledger, human review and audit gates.
notes: Slice proof 2026-06-30: added typed ContentWorkItem workflow state in wilq/content/workflow/models.py with state blockers for evidence, source connectors, inventory, public final canonical URL, duplicate gate, preflight, preserve-first plan, sales brief, claim ledger, draft package, human review, audit and measurement window. The workflow explicitly allows preparing useful content work before post-publication metrics, but blocks draft/handoff without a measurement plan and blocks outcome claims until the measurement window is ready. Focused checks passed: tests/content/test_workflow_state.py, tests/content (46 tests), Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke for wilq/content, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.
close_reason: Completed ContentWorkItem workflow state baseline: typed model and transition blockers now prove preflight, sales brief, claim ledger, human review, audit and measurement gates cannot be skipped. Draft/handoff require a measurement plan, while outcome claims remain blocked until the measurement window is ready.

title: Goal 002 extract content domain services without behavior change
description: Create content domain modules for inventory, preflight, canonical, planning, claims, drafting, handoff and measurement, then move content behavior out of wilq/briefing/content_diagnostics.py gradually.
design: First slice must preserve /api/content/diagnostics behavior. wilq/briefing/content_diagnostics.py becomes a composer over domain services, not the source of new product logic.
acceptance_criteria: Focused content diagnostics contract tests pass before and after extraction. New content modules do not import wilq.briefing or API routers.
notes:
Slice proof 2026-06-30: canonical/public URL semantics moved from wilq/briefing/content_diagnostics.py into wilq/content/canonical/urls.py without changing behavior. Focused tests passed: tests/content/test_canonical_urls.py, two content diagnostics contract tests, Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke and git diff --check. Slice proof 2026-06-30: content preflight verdict helpers moved from wilq/briefing/content_diagnostics.py into wilq/content/preflight/verdicts.py without changing behavior. Focused tests passed: tests/content/test_preflight_verdicts.py, tests/content/test_canonical_urls.py, two content diagnostics contract tests, Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. Slice proof 2026-06-30: inventory/canonical/duplicate gate status rules moved from wilq/briefing/content_diagnostics.py into wilq/content/inventory/gates.py without changing behavior, while unused private WordPress inventory detail helpers were deleted instead of preserved as dead code. Focused tests passed: tests/content/test_inventory_gates.py, tests/content/test_preflight_verdicts.py, tests/content/test_canonical_urls.py, two content diagnostics contract tests, Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. Slice proof 2026-06-30: content decision metrics, priority, title/summary, sorting and small formatting helpers moved from wilq/briefing/content_diagnostics.py into wilq/content/planning/decisions.py without changing behavior. title: Clarify Beads recovery rules in AGENTS
description: Add WILQ-specific guidance that Beads is the development task graph, bd prime/bd ready are recovery steps, and product truth remains in WILQ API, PLAN/PLANS, docs/goals, progress docs and knowledge cards.
close_reason: AGENTS.md now includes Beads recovery commands and WILQ-specific source-of-truth boundaries.

title: Wire beads into WILQ repo
description: Install bd, initialize beads in the repository and accept the generated AGENTS.md workflow instructions so active cleanup work can move into a dependency-aware issue graph.
design: Beads tracks development issues only. WILQ product knowledge remains in typed knowledge cards and PLAN/PLANS/docs remain the product/recovery sources.
acceptance_criteria: bd version works, bd status shows the workspace, AGENTS.md contains beads workflow guidance, .beads is initialized and the initialization commit is present.
close_reason: Installed bd 1.0.4, initialized .beads, accepted generated AGENTS.md workflow instructions and created the Goal 001 task graph.

title: Strengthen language and logic guardrails without test theater
description: Promote repeated cleanup findings into focused guardrails: marketer language guard, context-pack guard, content URL semantics, route tests, API contract assertions or skill smokes. Guardrails must catch real regressions, not just count words.
design: Prefer narrow checks near the producing source. Do not block technical fields in schemas when they are not shown to the marketer.
acceptance_criteria: Each new or changed guardrail has a concrete failure it would catch and is referenced from the related issue/progress note. scripts/verify.sh or focused gates include the guardrail when appropriate.
notes: Slice proof 2026-06-29: marketer language guard now blocks bare Ads missing status/channel copy. Verified tests/test_marketer_language_guard.py, scripts/marketer_language_guard.py, static rg for old literals and git diff --check.

title: Move remaining raw labels and vendor enum fallbacks into API labels
description: Continue replacing raw snake_case, vendor enums, source names, blocker names and evidence/source summaries visible to the marketer with typed API/domain labels. UI can format numbers, but must not invent business meaning.
design: Use typed schema/view-model/domain label fields. Technical IDs and raw enums may remain in technical detail, audit trace and internal schema fields.
acceptance_criteria: Newly touched API/dashboard tests prove unknown vendor/read-contract states do not fall back to raw English or snake_case on primary surfaces. No React replaceLabel/remapper layer is introduced.
notes:
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Ads missing status/channel fallbacks now say 'status kampanii niepotwierdzony', 'typ kampanii niepotwierdzony' and 'status słowa niepotwierdzony' at API/domain source. Verified focused pytest, App route test, ruff I/F, marketer language guard, rg for old literals and agent-browser read of /ads-doctor.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Workflow missing-contract detail hydration now returns 'Dane kompletne dla tego procesu' instead of a bare missing-state fallback when no workflow contracts are missing. Verified focused workflow API tests, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack language guards, live /api/workflows proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Ads change-history resource, operation and change-source fallbacks now explain unconfirmed state from API/domain labels instead of context-free missing placeholders. Verified focused Ads API tests, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack language guards, live Ads diagnostics proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Localo read-contract and access labels now explain unconfirmed/unconnected data scopes from API/domain copy instead of bare missing-data placeholders. Command Center Localo summary now handles full vs partial Localo evidence without empty missing-contract phrasing. Verified focused Localo/API tests, ruff I/F, marketer language guard, live /api/localo/diagnostics proof, context-pack guard and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Knowledge operating-map bindings now use a full operator sentence for complete missing-contract detail labels instead of a bare fallback. Verified focused API tests, Knowledge/App dashboard tests, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack guards, live /api/knowledge/operating-map proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Ads business-context metric tiles now explain missing margin, business goal, budget goal and strategy review states as concrete operator states instead of bare placeholders. Also tightened the live Ads diagnostics campaign-row fixture to assert operator metric labels. Verified focused Ads API tests, App dashboard test, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack guards, live /api/ads/diagnostics proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Daily, Ads, Ahrefs and Merchant missing status labels now describe unconfirmed data scopes instead of bare missing-data copy in active briefing contracts. Verified focused API label tests, App dashboard test, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack guards, live command-center/Ads/Merchant/Ahrefs status-label proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Content action labels now describe missing content contracts and unavailable GSC metrics as unconfirmed source data instead of bare missing placeholders. Verified focused API/helper tests, App dashboard test, ruff I/F, marketer/context-pack guards, live content action string scan and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Action preview, Content, GA4 and tactical WordPress/Ads fallback labels now describe the unconfirmed fact instead of bare 'brak'/'brak danych' copy. No React remapper or stale alias was added. Verified focused API tests, App/ActionDetail dashboard tests, ruff I/F, marketer/context/operator language guards, live API proof and git diff --check.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Command Center, evidence freshness, GA4/Merchant freshness and Ads recommendation impact copy no longer use bare 'brak danych'/'brak odczytu' or false zero-cost impact for unknown data. Verified focused API/dashboard tests, ruff I/F, live /api/dashboard/command-center scan, marketer/context/operator language guards and git diff --check.
close_reason: Active raw fallback cleanup passed for touched marketer surfaces: no bare brak/brak danych patterns remain in the scanned active sources beyond negative test assertions, focused tests and live API proof passed, and no React remapper or stale alias was introduced.

title: Remove stale dev-preview and migration semantics from active contracts
description: Find active references that treat ekologus.dev.proudsite.pl, target_site, migration, mapping-review or migration-map semantics as current product logic. Dev hosts are optional design/staging previews only; ekologus.pl remains canonical public content home.
design: Historical archives may mention old terms. Active contracts should use source_public_url, preview_url, intended_final_url and final_canonical_url only where that URL concept is actually needed.
acceptance_criteria: Active docs, API output, dashboard copy, skill contracts and eval fixtures do not present dev preview as final/canonical/SEO target. Any touched stale fields are migrated directly instead of preserved as compatibility aliases. Existing content remains preserve-first.
close_reason: Active dev-preview/migration audit passed. rg over active API/dashboard/schema/skill code found only guard/smoke references; focused operator endpoint/content URL tests, marketer language guard and live_contract_smoke all passed.

title: Audit and condense main marketer surfaces
description: Audit /command-center, /merchant, /content-planner, /ads-doctor, /ga4, /localo, /knowledge, /actions and action detail for first-screen usefulness. Each surface must answer what to do, why, blocker, proof freshness and next safe step without exposing technical internals first.
design: Do not use route-level translator maps or replaceLabel helpers. If a decision explanation is canonical, it belongs in typed API/domain view-model.
acceptance_criteria: Each touched route has focused tests and browser proof. Any first-screen copy that does not defend the decision is fixed at API/view-model source when canonical, or in UI only for display-only framing. Technical details stay in drawers/details.
notes:
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Content metric tile null values now render 'metryka niepotwierdzona' instead of a bare missing-state word. Verified focused dashboard test, marketer language guard, git diff --check and agent-browser read of /content-planner.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Shared MetricFactChips now render an unknown trend direction as 'zmiana: kierunek niepotwierdzony' instead of 'zmiana: brak'. Verified focused component test, marketer language guard, git diff --check and agent-browser read of /localo.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: Merchant first-screen fallbacks for report counts, problem resolution and product samples no longer use bare missing-state copy. Verified Merchant source/render tests, marketer language guard, git diff --check and agent-browser read of /merchant.
Slice proof 2026-06-29: workflow cards now explain missing dedicated route/view instead of rendering bare missing-view fallback text. Verified WorkflowPanels test, marketer language guard, static rg for old fallback and git diff --check.

title: Goal 002 extract Codex context-pack runtime internals
description: Move heavy Codex context-pack construction helpers out of apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into a focused runtime/service module without changing /api/codex/context or /api/codex/context-pack response shapes.
design: This is behavior-preserving extraction after router extraction. Keep routers thin. Do not add content product behavior, prompt logic or dashboard labels. The service may depend on domain builders and stores, but no domain module may import apps.api.
acceptance_criteria: Focused Codex context-pack API tests and route smoke pass before and after extraction. main.py no longer owns context-pack helper internals beyond app wiring. Context-pack output remains API-owned, evidence-gated and redacted.
notes: Partial slice 2026-06-30: Demand Gen context-pack diagnostics and readiness-contract construction moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py to apps/api/wilq_api/context_demand_gen.py. main.py now delegates the Demand Gen skill payload and /api/demand-gen/diagnostics router builder to that runtime module. The old private main.py monkeypatch test was updated to target context_demand_gen directly; no production compatibility alias was kept. Focused checks passed: Ruff on main.py/context_demand_gen.py, mypy on main.py/context_demand_gen.py, focused pytest for Demand Gen context-pack payloads, diagnostics readiness contract, no-full-GA4-builder behavior and summary-view builder behavior, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. Issue remains open for remaining action-payload context builders.

title: Keep PLAN, PLANS, PROGRESS and beads aligned without append-only clutter
description: Use beads as the operational graph while keeping PLAN.md, PLANS.md, docs/PROGRESS.md and docs/goals/001-goal.md short. Remove outdated active-plan text instead of adding parallel narratives.
design: PLAN.md remains canonical for product rules; PLANS.md remains long-range; docs/PROGRESS.md remains current readout; beads tracks operational work and dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: Recovery docs point to beads for task graph, contain only current facts and do not duplicate the full issue list. bd ready shows the next actionable work after each slice.
close_reason: Recovery docs are aligned with the current Beads graph: closed label cleanup is no longer listed as active work, docs point to bd ready for the queue, and Goal 001 completion check still records UAT/defer as the blocker.
